content.en:
If Ye Tian wants to comprehend the Yuan Dao, it is naturally impossible to blindly comprehend and practice, and he has to use the Dao Void True Tree to have any hope of comprehending the Yuan Dao.

So, Ye Tian took out a piece of the Dao Void True Tree to practice for enlightenment.

Under the action of the Dao Void True Tree, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao began to evolve and merge.

Of course, this is not a real fusion, it is just a preliminary derivative fusion, and the Yuan Dao is a more powerful Dao that is comprehended in this derivative fusion, beyond the Extreme Dao.

If there was no Daokong True Tree, it would not have been possible to achieve such a clear evolution process.

And as time passes, the effect of this Interception Void True Tree will also be exhausted, and it will eventually become an ordinary branch with no special effects.

"It's too difficult, just this section of the Empty True Tree, the effect is too average!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, this also has something to do with the fact that he wants to comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao, if he only comprehends the Ninefold Yuan Dao, it will be much simpler, and if he wants to comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao, the price to pay will be great!

For example, the Dao Void True Tree he obtained this time was all used, and it was impossible to comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao.

However, Ye Tian could copy the Daokong True Tree, and he could still help himself to comprehend the Yuan Dao.

Soon, Ye Tian began to copy the Daokong True Tree, but the process of copying was very slow, after all, the grade of the Daokong True Tree was too high, and it took a lot of resources and time to copy the Daokong True Tree.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian spent 10,000 Origin Domain Era before he succeeded in copying the branches of the Daokong True Tree.

Since he hadn't seen the complete Daokong True Tree, he couldn't replicate the complete Daokong True Tree, but it was enough to replicate this branch.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian used the copied Dao Void True Tree to comprehend and cultivate the Yuan Dao, as long as he didn't destroy this section of the Dao Void True Tree branch, the Dao Void True Tree branch would not dissipate.

"The effect is okay, so let's see it like this!"

Ye Tian said with satisfaction.

Time flies, and in the blink of an eye, more than 500,000 years of the Origin Era have passed.

And Ye Tian had already used this Void True Tree thoroughly, and there was no effect anymore.

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to copy this section of the branch of the Dao Void True Tree and continued to practice enlightenment.

In this way, the Daokong True Tree was useless, Ye Tian continued to copy, continued to comprehend, and comprehended again and again, and before he knew it, ten million years of the Origin Domain Era had passed.

this day.

The Golden Light Domain opened again, and Han Xuan entered the Golden Light Domain again, still sweeping everything.

At this time, those Sixfold Origin Ancestors in the Tongtian Origin Domain were very dissatisfied, after all, Han Xuan entered again, which was simply unfair to the other Triple Origin Ancestors.

But those Triple Origin Ancestors couldn't beat Han Xuan, and they, the Sixfold Origin Ancestors, couldn't beat Ye Tian, so they couldn't do anything about it, and it was impossible to find Xuanqing Dao Ancestor for such a small matter.

So, they can only be secretly annoyed.

......

"Failed!"

Han Xuan came out of the Golden Light Domain and frowned after practicing in retreat for a while.

She still hadn't comprehended the three hundred and sixty-four Extreme Extreme Dao, as if she was still a little behind, and the special golden light in the Golden Light Domain didn't help her much, and it could even be said that it had no effect.

Even if she went to the Golden Light Domain ten more times, I am afraid that she would not be able to comprehend the three hundred and sixty-four extreme extreme paths.

"Could it be that you really have to rely on a lot of time to grind slowly?"

Han Xuan said secretly.

Another long time has passed.

Now, Ye Tian has come to the Tongtian Origin Domain Realm for more than 20 million years of the Origin Domain Era, which is a long time.

And in such a long time, Ye Tian copied the Daokong True Tree many times, and he had been working hard to comprehend, and finally comprehended the prototype of the Yuan Dao.

That's right, it's just a rudiment, and it's still 108,000 miles away from comprehending the true Yuan Dao!

However, what he comprehended was the rudimentary form of the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and even if it was a rudiment, its power was still very powerful, far surpassing those extreme extreme paths.

"This Yuan Dao Prototype is a combination of three hundred and sixty-five Extreme Extreme Dao comprehensions, so it's called the Endless Yuan Dao Prototype!" Ye Tian muttered.

After all, the Endless Yuan Dao Prototype is the Ninefold Yuan Dao Prototype, and its power may not be weaker than the ordinary Yuan Dao.

In addition, Ye Tian's original strength could not be terrifyingly powerful, and now that he has mastered the Endless Yuan Dao Prototype, his strength may be no less than the weaker half-step Sevenfold Ancestor.

Moreover, after comprehending the Endless Yuan Dao Prototype, the power of his several Supreme Natal Primordial Control Techniques also skyrocketed, and it could be integrated into the power of the Endless Yuan Dao Prototype to explode into an even more terrifying effect.

"It's a pity that I didn't comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao, if I comprehend the real Endless Yuan Dao, the Supreme Natal Primordial Control Technique will also transform into the Supreme Natal Yuan Dao Control Technique, and the power will increase to an unimaginable level!"

Anyway, Ye Tian was already satisfied, after all, if it was someone else, where could he hope to comprehend the prototype of the Yuan Dao in the middle of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, not to mention that it was still the prototype of the Ninefold Yuan Dao, which was almost impossible!

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to try to combine the Endless Yuan Dao Prototype with his many own means, and truly turned the power of the Endless Yuan Dao Prototype into his own use.

......

Swire Daomeng.

One Dao Ancestor opened the meeting, and a copy of Ye Tian's body also came here to participate in this meeting.

meeting.

The Heavenless Dao Ancestor of the Ancient Dao Alliance said: "Fellow Dao Ancestors, I just got the news that a Primordial Ancient Artifact has appeared in the Silent Black Sea nearby, the Yuan Shen Drum, and this Primordial Ancient Artifact will launch a concussive attack, and the weaker Dao Ancestors will be shocked to the point that their flesh will be torn apart. Moreover, there is more than one Genshin Drum of this kind, and this kind of primordial antiquity has never appeared before, and it should be a primordial antiquity that has recently migrated here. There is a Dao Ancestor who killed the Yuan Shen Drum and actually obtained a special black liquid from the Yuan Shen Drum, once this black liquid is swallowed and refined, it can improve our understanding to an unimaginable level. Those sixfold peak ancestors who wanted to comprehend the Yuan Dao all started to act, wanting to find this primordial artifact. If we kill this Yuan Shen Drum, we can obtain this special black liquid, and even if we don't need it, we can sell it to other Dao Ancestors!"

"Can this black liquor be used again and again? Or is there a limit?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, we don't know about this, after all, the Yuan Shen Drum has only come out for a short time, but if any treasure is used too much, the effect will definitely get worse and worse!"

"Heavenless Dao Ancestor, the Silent Black Sea is dangerous, if you are not careful, you will fall!" said the Void White Dao Ancestor worriedly.

Heavenless Dao Ancestor nodded, "I naturally know this, so it's best for everyone to form a team and go to the Silent Black Sea, and not too far away from the primeval realm boundary, or close to other primordial realm boundaries, so that if you encounter danger, you can escape into the zone boundary." This is a good opportunity, even if we kill a Yuan Shen Drum, it will be a big profit! Once the Yuan Shen Drum disappears and leaves this area, we will not have such a chance!"

"I'm going to go, which Dao Ancestor will team up with me?"

A Dao Ancestor said.

Ye Tian was not ready to team up with any Dao Ancestor, after all, their strength was too weak, and he was ready to go to the Silent Black Sea alone.
